ogTitle: Charley Creek vs Cherry Tree Pool: Climate Safety

heading: Charley Creek vs Cherry Tree Pool — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Charley Creek, Western Australia and Cherry Tree Pool, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Charley Creek and Cherry Tree Pool have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Charley Creek or Cherry Tree Pool safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Charley Creek has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Cherry Tree Pool scores 60/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Charley Creek scores 42/100 for bushfire risk. Cherry Tree Pool scores 30/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Charley Creek or Cherry Tree Pool?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Charley Creek has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
